title: Decision No. 58 of 2025 Amending Decision No. 67 of 2021 Designating Foreign States under Legislative Decree No. 56 of 2018
summary: Updates the foreign-state designation framework for foreign-party customer content hosted through Bahrain cloud services.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Further amends the foreign-state designations under the cloud law.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Further amends the designated foreign-state list under Bahrain’s cloud law.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Decision No. 67 of 2021
